<title>Workplace Safety Fundamentals | The Ethereal Archive</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        "surface-container": "#19191e",
                        "surface-container-high": "#1f1f25",
                        "surface-tint": "#46a5ff",
                        "outline": "#75757d",
                        "primary": "#46a5ff",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#326800",
                        "on-error": "#490006",
                        "secondary": "#87dc47",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#94ea53",
                        "error": "#ff716c",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#e6fe2c",
                        "secondary-dim": "#7acd39",
                        "surface-dim": "#0e0e12",
                        "on-background": "#e6e4ee",
                        "surface-variant": "#25252c",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#00294a",
                        "on-primary-container": "#001429",
                        "on-surface": "#e6e4ee",
                        "on-primary": "#002442",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#444c00",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#000000",
                        "on-error-container": "#ff9993",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#66b723",
                        "tertiary-container": "#e0f824",
                        "background": "#0e0e12",
                        "secondary-container": "#112c00",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#5f6a00",
                        "primary-container": "#0097fc",
                        "primary-fixed": "#94c4ff",
                        "on-secondary": "#214900",
                        "inverse-surface": "#fbf8fe",
                        "on-tertiary": "#5a6500",
                        "surface-bright": "#2b2c33",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#d8ef15",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#78b7ff",
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#555459",
                        "surface-container-low": "#131317",
                        "error-dim": "#c94947",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#214800",
                        "primary-dim": "#3da2ff",
                        "tertiary-dim": "#d8ef15",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#25252c",
                        "tertiary": "#f7ffba",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#a2f960",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#00477b",
                        "error-container": "#8a1a1e",
                        "outline-variant": "#47474f",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#525c00",
                        "inverse-primary": "#0062a6",
                        "surface": "#0e0e12",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#abaab3"
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        "headline": ["Inter"],
                        "body": ["Inter"],
                        "label": ["Inter"]
                    },
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "full": "9999px"},
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .glass { background: rgba(25, 25, 30, 0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); }
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24; }
        details > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
        .hide-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
    </style>
